name: claude-ichiba
description: Claude Code plugins by Gwenneg Lepage

plugins.name: ai-mentor
plugins.description: Describe your engineering problem, get the right AI workflow. Ranked, verified recommendations with ready-to-paste prompts that teach you why each approach works — not just how.

plugins.name: togi
plugins.description: Captures AI coding friction — corrections, clarifications, denied tool calls — in-session at no extra cost, and turns recurring doc gaps into context-doc pull requests.
